title: RBI imposes monetary penalty on Pandharpur Urban Co-operative Bank Ltd., Pandharpur, Maharashtra
description: The Reserve Bank of India (RBl) has, by an order dated April 29, 2026, imposed a monetary penalty of ₹2 lakh (Rupees Two Lakh only) on Pandharpur Urban Co-operative Bank Ltd., Pandharpur, Maharashtra (the bank), for non-compliance with certain directions issued by RBI on ‘Asset classification and treatment of accounts as Non-Performing Assets’. This penalty has been imposed in exercise of powers conferred on RBI under the provisions of Section 47A(1)(c) read with Sections 46(4)
